title: Cat's Gems
description: A mod that adds various superpowers in the form of gems.
body:
## Overview:
A mod that adds various gems. Each gem has an Angellic ability (unlocked from the start), and a Demonic Ability (unlocked at T2), which have seperate cooldowns. It also adds a secret gem not obtainable normally called the Dragon Gem. The Dragon Gem is one-of-a-kind, as it is only craftable using the Dragon Egg. Unlike all other gems, it cannot be upgraded, and starts with 3 abilities. By default, you will obtain a random T1 gem upon spawning in, but it can be swapped out using a Gem Switcher or upgraded using Upgrade Shards.
## Gems:
### T1:
- Gem of Spirit:
> Angelic Ability - Ghastly Form: Gain 3m of Invisibility [4m Cooldown]
- Gem of Flame:
> Angelic Ability - Fireball: Shoot a Ghast Fireball. [10s Cooldown]
- Gem of Frost:
> Angelic Ability - Chilled Wind: Slow all nearby entities for 15s. [Cooldown: 45s]
- Gem of Venom: 
> Angellic Ability - Spiderfang: Inflict Poison I to all nearby entities for 30s. [1m Cooldown]
- Gem of Swiftness:
> Angellic Ability - Swiftstep: Gain Speed I for 2m [2:30 Cooldown]
- Gem of Life:
> Angellic Ability - Healing Aura: Gain Regeneration II for 15s [45s Cooldown]
### T2:
- Gem of Spirit EX:
> - Angellic Ability - Spirit Form: Enter Spectator Mode for 10s. [30s Cooldown]
> - Demonic Ability - Phase Step: Teleport 8m Forward. [10s Cooldown]
- Gem of Flame EX:
> - Angellic Ability - Draconic Fireball: Shoot a Dragon Fireball. [10s Cooldown]
> - Demonic Ability - Heatwave: Light all Nearby Entities on fire. [1m Cooldown]
- Gem of Frost EX:
> - Angellic Ability - Freezing Wind: Freeze all nearby entities for 15s. [45s Cooldown]
> - Demonic Ability - Gemfrost - Prevent all nearby entities from using Gems for 1m. [2:30 Cooldown]
- Gem of Venom EX:
> - Angellic Ability - Weaverfang: Inflict Wither II to all nearby entities for 30s. [1m Cooldown]
> - Demonic Ability - Webslinger: Trap all nearby entities in a Cobweb. [20s Cooldown]
- Gem of Swiftness EX:
> - Angellic Ability - Godspeed: Gain speed II for 2m [3m Cooldown]
> - Demonic Ability - Thunderhaste: Gain heavy Haste for 30s [1:30 Cooldown]
- Gem of Life EX:
> - Angellic Ability - Rapid Regeneration: Gain Regeneration IV for 15s. [1m Cooldown]
> - Demonic Ability - Lifesteal: Damage nearby entities, gaining Absorption based on damage dealt. [2m Cooldown]
### Dragon Gem:
- Angellic Ability - Dragonflurry: Shoot a flurry of Dragon Fireballs. [15s Cooldown]
- Demonic Ability - Dragonflight: Gain Creative Flight for 15s. [1m Cooldown]
- Eternal Ability - Dragonhome: Teleport to the Central End Island. [15m Cooldown]
